moments.title: US Independence Day
moments.blurb: The United States celebrates its Independence Day on 4 July every year, commemorating the adoption of the Declaration of Independence in 1776

angles.name: US Ties
angles.copy: As the US marks its Independence Day, we look at the special bond between the US and the UK

angles.name: American Music
angles.copy: Celebrate American music on the 4th of July, from Elvis to modern-day chart-toppers

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: It's Independence Day in the US, but for us, it's just a great excuse for a summer party

moments.title: British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix takes place at Silverstone on 5 July, round 12 of the 2026 F1 season

angles.name: Racing Action
angles.copy: Get ready for the British Grand Prix at Silverstone, one of the most iconic tracks in F1

angles.name: UK Pride
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is a proud moment for UK motorsport, with a rich history of producing talented drivers

angles.name: F1 Excitement
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is set to be an exciting event, with top drivers competing for the top spot

moments.title: The Open Championship
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship takes place at Royal Birkdale from 16 to 19 July 2026

angles.name: Golfing Greats
angles.copy: The Open Championship is one of the most prestigious golf tournaments in the world, with a long history of legendary winners

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: The Open Championship is being held at Royal Birkdale, a challenging course that demands skill and strategy from the world's top golfers

angles.name: Golfing Heritage
angles.copy: The Open Championship is a celebration of golf's rich heritage, with a history dating back to 1860

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games come to Glasgow from 23 July to 2 August 2026, a home Games for Scotland

angles.name: Scottish Pride
angles.copy: The Glasgow Commonwealth Games is a proud moment for Scotland, showcasing the country's sporting talent and hospitality

angles.name: Global Competition
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games brings together athletes from around the world, competing in a variety of sports and events

angles.name: Glasgow Prepares
angles.copy: Glasgow is gearing up to host the Commonwealth Games, with final preparations underway to ensure a successful event

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show takes place from 20 to 23 July 2026 at Llanelwedd, Builth Wells, the biggest agricultural show in Europe

angles.name: Agricultural Excellence
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a celebration of agricultural excellence, showcasing the best of Welsh farming and rural life

angles.name: Welsh Heritage
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a proud reflection of Welsh heritage and culture, with a long history dating back to 1904

angles.name: Rural Community
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a vital event for the rural community, promoting agriculture, education, and entertainment
